why: CHART: pin break to new day high 7556.88 (100% of range), two strong green 5-min candles 10:20/10:25, momentum accelerating 5m +0.13%/15m +0.20%, above VWAP. GEX CONFIRM: 7550 king flipped from overhead resistance to pika FLOOR beneath price (+21M); no wall until 7575 (+15.6M) = ~18pts air overhead. This is the transition OUT of the pin. Invalidation = loss of 7550 floor.

CHART: breakout failed to follow through — price faded from 7556.9 HOD back to 7551.7 (10:30 red candle), momentum flipped negative 5m -0.04%, back to 83% of range. GEX: 7550 floor weakening (1mΔ-1.2, +21M→+17.8M) as price returns to it; positive-gamma pin re-asserted. Thesis broken, cut the small loss before the floor gives way toward 7525.

CHART: established accelerating uptrend — four green 5-min candles (7555->7561->7568->7569), new HOD 7568.96, 100% of range, above VWAP, momentum 5m +0.10%/15m +0.20%. GEX CONFIRM: regime just FLIPPED positive->NEGATIVE gamma (net -11M) = trending fuel, levels break, so the 7575 king (+22M) is set to break not hold; floor 7550 (+14M) refilling beneath (1mΔ+1.1). This is the pin->trend transition. Target break/extension above 7575, cap winner; invalidation = hard 7575 rejection + momentum roll.

CHART: pushed +5pts from 7568.96 entry to 7573.89 HOD, but candle advances shrinking (7570.5->7572.3->7573.9) = momentum grinding to a halt into resistance. GEX: 7575 king growing aggressively +22M->+27M (dealers defending hard) while negative-gamma fuel fades (net -11M->-6M). Method rule: cap 0DTE winners, exit into the next opposing node — the +27M 7575 king is that node right at price. Bank the gain before it round-trips off the wall.

CHART: 7575 rejected — coil under it broke DOWN, price rolling over from 7574 to 7567, momentum turned negative both TFs (5m -0.05%/15m -0.09%), two down closes 7568.6->7567.2. GEX CONFIRM: 7575 king proven ceiling (+31M, held+grew all day); 7570 coil floor just DISSOLVED, nearest floor now 7550 (+9.5M, shrinking 1mΔ-1.1) = air below; NEGATIVE gamma (-9M) = downside fuel, levels break. Target VWAP 7554 / 7550 floor (next opposing node), cap there. Invalidation = reclaim >7570 or stabilize above VWAP.

Confirming regime FLIPPED: NEGATIVE gamma (my short fuel) -> POSITIVE gamma (net +3M, levels hold). 7550 pika floor RE-FORMED (+11.4M) right below; downside collapse stalled after only ~3pts (11:50 green candle 7563.7->7564.9, momentum decel -0.06%->-0.03%), never reached VWAP. Method: exit when confirming regime flips / chart thesis breaks. Bank the tiny gain, avoid countertrend short into a positive-gamma bounce.
